reasoning: The current spot price of gold in late August 2025 is approximately $3,404 per ounce. The Polymarket price as of Aug 21 was 72%. The GC00 contract reflects the front-month futures contract, which on December 31, 2025, will likely be the February 2026 contract. Due to contango (carrying costs), this futures contract generally commands a slight premium over spot, meaning the relevant price target represents a drop of >$200 (or about 6.5-7%) from currently implied futures prices over the next 4 months. Assuming a gold annualized volatility of ~15%, a 4-month volatility is roughly 8.6%. The z-score for a 6.5-7% drop is approximately -0.75 to -0.8, which corresponds to around a 75-78% probability of remaining above the $3,200 threshold. Given the robust current price and alignment with the mathematical options-pricing approach, a 76% forecast is appropriate.
